admin-crm.title: CRM Reporting
admin-crm.description: Tenant-wide CRM reporting for pipeline health, source quality, and forecast snapshots.

snapshot.title: Latest forecast snapshot
snapshot.description: Previous UTC snapshot date, grouped by currency.
snapshot.empty: No forecast snapshot has been generated for the previous UTC date.
snapshot.staleEmpty: The latest snapshot is stale. Current values are hidden until the scheduler refreshes them.

branchPipeline.title: Branch pipeline summary
branchPipeline.description: Live 90-day weighted pipeline by branch, pipeline, and currency.
branchPipeline.empty: No live pipeline rows are available for the default reporting window.

sourceBreakdown.title: Source breakdown
sourceBreakdown.description: Top CRM sources by deal count for the default reporting window.
sourceBreakdown.empty: No source rows are available for the default reporting window.

branchManager.title: Branch CRM Reporting
branchManager.description: Branch-scoped CRM reporting for pipeline health, source quality, and forecast snapshots.

snapshot.title: Branch forecast snapshot
snapshot.description: Previous UTC snapshot date for your branch, grouped by currency.
snapshot.empty: No branch forecast snapshot has been generated for the previous UTC date.
snapshot.staleEmpty: The latest branch snapshot is stale. Current values are hidden until the scheduler refreshes them.

branchPipeline.title: Branch pipeline summary
branchPipeline.description: Live 90-day weighted pipeline for your branch, grouped by pipeline and currency.
branchPipeline.empty: No branch pipeline rows are available for the default reporting window.

sourceBreakdown.title: Branch source breakdown
sourceBreakdown.description: Top CRM sources by deal count for your branch in the default reporting window.
sourceBreakdown.empty: No branch source rows are available for the default reporting window.

forecastObservability.title: Forecast snapshot observability
forecastObservability.description: Operational coverage for the previous UTC forecast snapshot date.
forecastObservability.empty: No expected or observed forecast snapshot work items were found for the previous UTC date.

coverage.title: Coverage
coverage.empty: No expected forecast snapshot work items are available for this date.
coverage.hidden: {count, plural, one {# coverage row hidden} other {# coverage rows hidden}}
coverage.hiddenHelp: Coverage rows are capped after deterministic sorting.

batches.title: Observed batches
batches.empty: No observed forecast snapshot batches are available for this date.

backfill.title: Forecast snapshot backfill
backfill.description: Dry-run and confirm bounded forecast snapshot repairs for this tenant.
backfill.help: Run a dry-run first, review aggregate impact, then confirm append-only write mode only if the request is unchanged.

dryRun.help: Dry-run does not insert snapshots. Completed or partial dry-runs create a short-lived confirmation.

confirm.warning: Write mode inserts append-only snapshots for the exact dry-run request.
confirm.invalidates: Changing any field requires a new dry-run.
confirm.expired: The confirmation expired. Run a new dry-run.
confirm.invalid: The confirmation no longer matches this request. Run a new dry-run.
confirm.inFlight: A write is already in flight for this confirmation.

error.unauthorized: This account cannot run forecast snapshot backfill.
error.invalid_request: The backfill request contains unsupported fields.
error.invalid_range: Use a valid UTC date range.
error.range_too_large: The date range is larger than the allowed backfill window.
error.date_out_of_bounds: The date range is outside the allowed historical bounds.
error.invalid_tenant: The submitted tenant must match your current admin session.
error.confirmation_invalid: The confirmation no longer matches this request. Run a new dry-run.
error.confirmation_expired: The confirmation expired. Run a new dry-run.
error.confirmation_in_flight: A write is already in flight for this confirmation.
error.rate_limited: Too many backfill attempts. Wait and try again.
error.all_dates_failed: All dates failed. No write confirmation is available.
error.partial_failure: The backfill completed with partial failures.
error.internal_error: Backfill could not be completed. Try again later.

charts.hiddenItems: {count, plural, one {# additional row hidden from the chart summary} other {# additional rows hidden from the chart summary}}

pipelineAmount.title: Pipeline amount chart
pipelineAmount.description: Supplemental comparison of total and weighted pipeline amount. The table above is the source of truth.

admin-crm.excludedRows: {count, plural, one {# aggregate row excluded} other {# aggregate rows excluded}}
admin-crm.excludedRowsHelp: Rows can be excluded from aggregate metrics when required reporting fields are missing or inconsistent.

error.tenant: CRM reporting is unavailable for this tenant context.
error.role: This admin account cannot view CRM reporting.
error.branch: CRM reporting requires a valid branch scope.
error.agent: Agent-scoped CRM reporting is not shown on the admin dashboard.
error.window: The CRM reporting window is invalid.
error.grouping: This CRM reporting grouping is not supported.
error.generic: CRM reporting could not be loaded. Try again later.
